issue.body:
Live backup retention-plan E2E.

Hidden backup retention-plan token: GITCLAW_BACKUP_RETENTION_PLAN_E2E_20260529T212513Z

transcript.Body:
@gitclaw /backup retention-plan e2e 20260529T212513Z

Live backup retention-plan E2E.

Hidden backup retention-plan token: GITCLAW_BACKUP_RETENTION_PLAN_E2E_20260529T212513Z
This should produce a deterministic backup report, then the fetched backup branch should render a dry-run retention plan without leaking this token.

## GitClaw Backup Report

Generated without a model call.

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- issue: `#73`
- backup_branch: `gitclaw-backups`
- issue_backup_path: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/issues/000073.json`
- index_path: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/index.json`
- readme_path: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/README.md`
- backup_schema_version: `1`
- raw_comments_now: `0`
- transcript_messages_now: `1`
- assistant_turn_comments_now: `0`
- issue_title_sha256_12: `e2f160c86735`

The backup job runs after a successful assistant turn and writes the raw transcript backup plus repo-scoped index to the dedicated backup branch.

Issue and comment bodies are not included in this report; the raw backup JSON is the canonical transcript copy.

### Backup Contents
- issue metadata
- raw issue comments
- reconstructed transcript with GitClaw assistant markers stripped
- generation timestamp
- schema version

### Verification
- `gitclaw backup verify --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo>`
- `gitclaw backup retention-plan --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo> --keep-latest 50`
- validates the repo-scoped index, README, canonical issue paths, JSON schema version, counts, timestamps, and traversal-safe payload paths
